title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: cockpit-machines bug fix and enhancement update

An update for cockpit-machines is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
